title: Opening of a trial for planned obsolescence against Epson: a historic first step
abstract: This is a first-of-its-kind case where Epson (爱普生) faces a lawsuit for planned obsolescence! Imagine the courtroom, with the plaintiff lawyer delivering a heated argument: "You knew that ink cartridges and ink would run out, yet you didn't provide more durable products. You're treating your customers like fools!" This scene is quite comedic, isn't it? Come witness this historic "trial day" in tech!
abstract_zh: 这回可真是开了个头啖汤！Epson（爱普生）要被起诉计划性报废了，这是史上第一次啊！想象一下法庭上，原告律师对着被告滔滔不绝：“你明明知道打印机的墨盒和墨水会用完，却不提供更耐用的产品。你这可是把用户当傻子啊！”这场景是不是有点搞笑？快来围观这场科技界的“审判日”吧！
